---
title: "Boruta escenari 50% amb gràfics"
author: "Max Ranz de la Iglesia"
date: "2026-06-18"
output: html_document
---

# Bortua 50% afegint gràfics
```{r}
# Boruta 50%
setwd("D:/Documentos/TFG/TFG-Selecci-de-variables-en-escenaris-complexos")
load("D:/Documentos/TFG/TFG-Selecci-de-variables-en-escenaris-complexos/dades_escenari_50_corrAleat.RData")
library(Boruta)
library(caret)
library(ggplot2)

resultats_boruta <- data.frame(
  N             = integer(),
  pi            = numeric(),
  correlation   = character(),  
  Sensibilitat  = numeric(),
  Especificitat = numeric(),
  VPP           = numeric(),
  VPN           = numeric(),
  Accuracy      = numeric(),
  NetBenefit    = numeric(),
  stringsAsFactors = FALSE
)
vars_seleccionades_boruta <- list()
models_boruta_exemple     <- list()   

system.time({
  for (i in seq_len(nrow(comb))) {
    N           <- comb$N[i]
    pi          <- comb$pi[i]
    correlation <- as.character(comb$correlation[i])
    metrics        <- list()
    vars_selec_bin <- matrix(0, nrow = iters, ncol = num_vars)
    model_boruta_last <- NULL   # <-- NOU

    for (j in 1:iters) {
      cat("Escenari", i, "- Simulació", j,
          "(N=", N, "pi=", pi, "corr=", correlation, ")\n")
      X_df  <- as.data.frame(X[[i]][[j]])
      y_fac <- as.factor(Y[[i]][[j]])
      df_boruta <- data.frame(y = y_fac, X_df)

      tryCatch({
        model_boruta <- suppressWarnings(
          Boruta(y ~ ., data = df_boruta, doTrace = 0)
        )
        model_boruta_last <- model_boruta  # Ara s'actualitza per iteració

        seleccionades <- getSelectedAttributes(model_boruta, withTentative = FALSE)
        if (length(seleccionades) > 0) {
          idx_sel <- as.numeric(gsub("[^0-9]", "", seleccionades))
          idx_sel <- idx_sel[!is.na(idx_sel) & idx_sel >= 1 & idx_sel <= num_vars]
          vars_selec_bin[j, idx_sel] <- 1
          metrics[[j]] <- metriques(idx_sel, nv = num_vars)
        } else {
          metrics[[j]] <- metriques(integer(0), nv = num_vars)
        }
      }, error = function(e) {
        cat(sprintf("  [WARN] Escenari %d, sim %d: %s\n", i, j, conditionMessage(e)))
        metrics[[j]] <<- metriques(integer(0), nv = num_vars)
      })
    }

    models_boruta_exemple[[i]] <- model_boruta_last   

    resultats_boruta <- rbind(
      resultats_boruta,
      data.frame(
        N             = N,
        pi            = pi,
        correlation   = correlation,
        Sensibilitat  = mean(sapply(metrics, function(x) x["sensibilitat"]),  na.rm = TRUE),
        Especificitat = mean(sapply(metrics, function(x) x["especificitat"]), na.rm = TRUE),
        VPP           = mean(sapply(metrics, function(x) x["VPP"]),           na.rm = TRUE),
        VPN           = mean(sapply(metrics, function(x) x["VPN"]),           na.rm = TRUE),
        Accuracy      = mean(sapply(metrics, function(x) x["accuracy"]),      na.rm = TRUE),
        NetBenefit    = mean(sapply(metrics, function(x) x["net_benefit"]),   na.rm = TRUE),
        stringsAsFactors = FALSE
      )
    )
    vars_seleccionades_boruta[[i]] <- vars_selec_bin
  }
})

print(resultats_boruta)
save(resultats_boruta, vars_seleccionades_boruta, models_boruta_exemple,
     file = "resultats_boruta_50_correlacio.RData")
```

```{r}

# MILLOR ESCENARI: N=1000,pi=0,2, correlació=0,1
escenari_plot <- 8
model_plot    <- models_boruta_exemple[[escenari_plot]]

if (!is.null(model_plot)) {

  par(mar = c(8, 4, 4, 2))
  plot(model_plot,
       las   = 2,          
       cex.axis = 0.55,    
       main  = sprintf("Boruta – Escenari %d (N=%d, pi=%s, corr=%s)",
                       escenari_plot,
                       comb$N[escenari_plot],
                       comb$pi[escenari_plot],
                       comb$correlation[escenari_plot]),
       xlab  = "",
       ylab  = "Importància (Z-score)")

  # Gràfic 2
  imp_df <- as.data.frame(model_plot$ImpHistory)

  imp_means <- colMeans(imp_df, na.rm = TRUE)

  decisio    <- model_plot$finalDecision                  
  shadow_nms <- c("shadowMin", "shadowMean", "shadowMax")

  var_nms <- names(decisio)
  plot_df <- data.frame(
    Variable   = var_nms,
    Importance = imp_means[var_nms],
    Decision   = as.character(decisio),
    stringsAsFactors = FALSE
  )

  plot_df <- plot_df[order(plot_df$Importance, decreasing = TRUE), ]
  plot_df$Variable <- factor(plot_df$Variable, levels = plot_df$Variable)

  cols <- c("Confirmed" = "#2ecc71", "Tentative" = "#f39c12", "Rejected" = "#e74c3c")

  g <- ggplot(plot_df, aes(x = Variable, y = Importance, fill = Decision)) +
    geom_bar(stat = "identity") +
    scale_fill_manual(values = cols,
                      labels = c("Confirmed" = "Confirmada",
                                 "Tentative" = "Tentativa",
                                 "Rejected"  = "Rebutjada")) +
    geom_hline(yintercept = imp_means["shadowMax"],  linetype = "dashed",
               colour = "steelblue", linewidth = 0.7) +
    geom_hline(yintercept = imp_means["shadowMean"], linetype = "dotted",
               colour = "steelblue", linewidth = 0.5) +
    labs(
      title = sprintf("Boruta – Escenari %d  (N = %d, π = %s, corr = %s)",
                      escenari_plot,
                      comb$N[escenari_plot],
                      comb$pi[escenari_plot],
                      comb$correlation[escenari_plot]),
      x    = "Variable",
      y    = "Importància mitjana (Z-score)",
      fill = "Decisió"
    ) +
    theme_bw(base_size = 11) +
    theme(
      axis.text.x  = element_text(angle = 90, vjust = 0.5, hjust = 1, size = 6),
      plot.title   = element_text(face = "bold", hjust = 0.5),
      legend.position = "top"
    )

  print(g)

  ggsave(sprintf("boruta_plot_escenari%d.png", escenari_plot),
         plot = g, width = 14, height = 6, dpi = 300)
}
```
